mainEntity.name: How to challenge low impairment rating after machine TBI in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: How to challenge low impairment rating after machine TBI in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request independent medical exam or Labor Commission hearing with second opinion physician.[4][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Insurers lowball ratings. AMA Guides standard—appeal with neuro tests. Farmington experts testify for higher awards.[4]

name: Challenging Impairment Ratings
description: Request independent medical exam or Labor Commission hearing with second opinion physician.[4][2]
